Science · Grade 2
Quarter 1 · Week 1 — Cycles of Nature/Insects
🔬 🌱 🌦️ ⚡ 🪨 🌊 🦋
🎮
Mini Game
Animal Fact Spinner

Click each animal to flip it and discover a fun fact!
Then tap ⭐ My Favorite! to pick yours.

🐘
Elephant
Elephants use their trunk like a hand — they can pick up tiny objects or give themselves a bath!
🐸
Frog
Frogs drink water through their skin — they don't need to open their mouths to stay hydrated!
🦋
Butterfly
Butterflies taste with their feet! They step on leaves to find out if it's a good spot for eggs.
🦁
Lion
A lion's roar can be heard 5 miles away! They roar to talk to their family and say "this is my home!"
🐢
Turtle
Turtles have been on Earth for over 200 million years — even longer than the dinosaurs!
⬇️
